title: Deterministic Telegram-origin restart routing in boot completion flow
summary: Ensure post-restart completion routing preserves Telegram origin/channel identity so confirmations are emitted back to Telegram deterministically, with explicit fallback rules for missing session IDs.

affectedFiles.description: Extend RestartContext with Telegram identity metadata and persist fields during restart context save.
Resolve deterministic post-restart routing and restore Telegram identity/origin before completion routing/logging.

diffPreview:
- RestartContext lacks previousTelegramChatId/previousTelegramUserId
+ RestartContext includes previousTelegramChatId?: string and previousTelegramUserId?: number

- boot.ts hardcodes boot-startup in Telegram branch fallback
+ boot.ts resolves channel/origin/sessionId via resolvedChannel/resolvedOrigin/resolvedSessionId with telegram-bootstrap fallback for Telegram

+ boot.ts restores telegramChatId/telegramUserId and forces SESSION_ORIGIN_TELEGRAM when channel/origin indicates Telegram before routing/logging
estimatedImpact: Prevents wrong-channel restart confirmations, ensures Telegram-triggered restarts reliably reply back to Telegram, and improves operator trust with deterministic routing.
executorPrompt: Apply the two-file src patch exactly as specified in the approved proposal, run npm run build, and report the build result plus a concise summary of changed lines and any compatibility notes.
